name: aurora-hover-card
title: Aurora Hover Card
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Hover-triggered detail panel for source metadata and compact previews.
docs:
Aurora component that expects `aurora-tokens` and `aurora-portal-container` to be installed first.

Default install target: `@ui/aurora/hover-card.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-portal-container`.
